title: Charuwts #2743
definition:
Haruz = "zealous"

 1) a man of Jotbah, father of Meshullemeth, wife of Manasseh and
    mother of Amon
nasbUsage:
Definition: Haruz = "zealous"

 1) a man of Jotbah, father of Meshullemeth, wife of Manasseh and
    mother of Amon

    NASB:  grandfather of King Amon
